title: Gaga cuneata
taxonomy: Gaga cuneata is a species within the plant family Convolvulaceae. This classification indicates that Gaga cuneata is a member of the morning glory family. parts: Gaga cuneata, a plant species native to the southwestern United States, is known for its medicinal properties. The roots and leaves of Gaga cuneata are used in traditional medicine, particularly by the Tohono O'odham people. The plant contains compounds that have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
